channel.title: OpenAI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in OpenAI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Open AI GPT-5.6 on Azure Databricks
item.description:
OpenAI GPT-5.6 is now generally available on Azure Databricks. Customers can use GPT 5.6 purchased through Microsoft Foundry via a Model Serving Endpoint in Azure Databricks.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are now available in GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GitHub Copilot is rolling out OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 family. The release adds three variants — Sol, Terra, and Luna — so users can choose a model based on the task.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GPT-5.5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GPT-5.5 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed the model performs best on complex, multi-step agentic coding tasks and real-world problem solving.

  • Source: GitHub
